On-Page SEO Optimization

Comprehensive page-level and homepage element optimization checklist

Page-Level Checklists

Team Page

Needs Improvement

No specific web page for the team and the Alt text says "Our Team"

Minimum 100 words per team member
Internal link to "Meet the Doctor" page
Services mentioned or linked within the text
Staff photos present
Alt text includes staff name

Doctor Pages

Slight Improvement

Alt text says "Biography" not the doctor's name

Minimum 250–400 words
Credentials listed (DDS, DMD, etc.)
Credentials or affiliations linked
Professional photo with matching alt text
Internal links to relevant services

Privacy Policy

Optimized
Privacy policy page exists

Blog

Needs Improvement
Clear title tag and meta description
Key takeaway section present
Author credit present
"Medically reviewed by" or author credit present

Service Pages

Slight Improvement
Keyword in headings (H1, H2, H3)
Secondary keywords throughout content
Clear call-to-action (CTA)
Service schema markup present
Optimized meta title and description
Matches commercial intent

Needs Improvement
Location keyword in headings (H1, H2)
Google Map embedded on page
Local images with descriptive alt text
Location-specific call-to-action
Matches commercial intent
